title: Fine Point Precision Tweezers Stainless Steel Expert Eyebrow Hair Removal Tool
description:
Unwanted hairs are no match for these Expert Beauty Eyebrow and Facial Hair Removal Tweezers! The tweezers are super fine point so that hair can be removed quickly and easily. These Fine Point tweezers are 5.5 inches in height, making them the perfect size for handheld expert hair removal. The sharp and thin end of the tweezers makes removing hair painless and quick. Simply press on the sides to trap an unwanted hair and pull quickly to remove it. Everyone needs a pair of tweezers when hairs grow in unflattering places. Make sure to look your best with these Fine Point Expert Beauty Tweezers!
